title: The Love Game
writer: Daniel Boulanger, Philippe de Broca, Geneviève Cluny
actors: Jean-Louis Maury, Geneviève Cluny, Jean-Pierre Cassel
plot: Victor takes life lightly. Jolly and offhand, he has been a very pleasant companion to Suzanne for two years now. But the young antique dealer is not satisfied with Victor's lightness any longer. She wants more. To marry him and t...
